top_signals.title: U.S. targets Iranian military assets in latest round of strikes as Tehran hits Gulf states
top_signals.summary: The U.S. has completed a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Interview with Les Échos
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Shell sells Indian wind and solar business for $1.8bn
top_signals.summary: Aditya Birla Renewables takes on Shell’s renewable assets in India as energy major continues to refocus on oil and gas
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
top_signals.summary: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Isabel Schnabel: How to foster growth and resilience in Europe
South Korean Won Hits Two-Month High on Inflow Expectations
top_signals.summary: The South Korean won advanced to its strongest level since May on expectations that dollar inflows from SK Hynix Inc’s American depositary receipts will enter the local currency market.

top_signals.title: Could an England World Cup win boost the markets?
top_signals.summary: The equity markets of World Cup-winning countries frequently outperform immediately after victory. A Goldman Sachs study of tournaments from 1974-2014 found that every winner except Brazil in 2002 subsequently enjoyed a period of market outperformance, says Helen Thomas If football finally came home, what might it do for financial markets, aside from a late start [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Stormlands AI remodels Bralorne, results show higher NPV
top_signals.summary: Using updated commodity pricing, Stormlands increased life-of-mine revenue from $551.9 million to $841.2 million.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Here’s an idea for you Gary Stevenson: a 0 per cent wealth tax
top_signals.summary: Gary Stevenson’s success lies in translating a highly complicated economic problem into an emotional story people instinctively understand. The trouble is that successful communication is not really about popularity, it is about ensuring the policy underpinning the message can survive contact with a political and economic reality, says Tim Focas Eye catching, the audience wants [...]
